title: Team (Key Differentiator - Elite Military/Law Enforcement Backgrounds)
content:
### Denis Voit - Founder
Former military (sniper division, Minister of Justice special unit). Counterterrorism work in UK, Belgium, France. 10+ years experience. Specializes in Jewish community security and educational institutions.


### Barry Little - COO
British Army veteran, 25+ years Special Forces Combat Infantry. Master Sniper Instructor. MBA + BA in Leadership & Management.


### Kenny Robertson - Director of Tactical Medical Training
US Army Green Beret (5th SFG), 22 years service. Multiple tours Iraq/Afghanistan/Syria/Lebanon. NAEMT Paramedic/Instructor, TCCC Instructor.


### Robert Luzzi - Retired Special Agent-in-Charge
25+ years law enforcement/intelligence. Nuclear nonproliferation, counterterrorism, WMD expertise.


### Philip David Glikman - Tactical Shooting & Self Defense Instructor
Official Emeth Krav Maga representative for FL/USA.

title: Contract Values (Security Industry)
content:
- Residential: $500-2,000/install + $30-50/month recurring
- Commercial: $5,000-25,000/contract
- Educational: $25,000-100,000+/year
- Personal protection: $15,000-50,000+
- Events: $2,000-10,000/event

title: Engagement Model
content:
- Commission-only / revenue share
- 10% on first-year contract value of attributable leads
- We build website + SEO + tracking for free
- Denis pays for any ad spend
- 12-month initial term
